list.vod_blurb: Nick Fallin is a hotshot lawyer working at his father&#039;s ultrasuccessful Pittsburgh law firm. Unfortunately, the high life has gotten the best of Nick. Arrested for drug use, he&#039;s sentenced to do 1,500 hours of community service, somehow
list.vod_content: Nick Fallin is a hotshot lawyer working at his father's ultrasuccessful Pittsburgh law firm. Unfortunately, the high life has gotten the best of Nick. Arrested for drug use, he's sentenced to do 1,500 hours of community service, somehow to be squeezed into his 24/7 cutthroat world of mergers, acquisitions and board meetings. Reluctantly, he's now The Guardian - a part-time chil...

list.vod_blurb: Punjabi playboy Romil and shy Tam-Brahm Jugal are the new Romeo and Juliet. But what happens when their fighting families and orthodox society find out? A funky twist on the greatest love story of all time, this young and never-seen-before rom-com version
list.vod_content: Punjabi playboy Romil and shy Tam-Brahm Jugal are the new Romeo and Juliet. But what happens when their fighting families and orthodox society find out? A funky twist on the greatest love story of all time, this young and never-seen-before rom-com version is filled with masti, masala, emotion, laughter, songs, and drama that is guaranteed to leave you hooked for more.

list.vod_blurb: Nice, summer of 1936. The elite are stunned as the first working-class vacationers arrive on the French Riviera, thanks to newly granted paid leave. In this clash of worlds, four women from different backgrounds find themselves entangled in a murder at th
list.vod_content: Nice, summer of 1936. The elite are stunned as the first working-class vacationers arrive on the French Riviera, thanks to newly granted paid leave. In this clash of worlds, four women from different backgrounds find themselves entangled in a murder at the chic Hotel Riviera. A crime that will shatter their families, their romances, and their lives forever.

list.vod_content: Isla Audiovisual, en colaboraciأ³n con Zebra Producciones (Grupo iZen), ha comenzado el rodaje de â€کEl libro negro de las horasâ€™, largometraje basado en la novela de Eva G.آھ Sأ،enz de Urturi. En julio de 2024, Isla Audiovisual anunciaba la adquisiciأ³n de los derechos de adaptaciأ³n de la saga â€کKrakenâ€™, asأ­ como el inicio del desarrollo de la primera entrega, tras un acuerdo con Scenic Rights. â€کEl libro negro de las horasâ€™ fue la segunda novela mأ،s vendida en Espaأ±a en 2022. A pesar de que la idea inicial era adaptar la saga al formato seriado, finalmente las novelas se convertirأ،n en largometrajes.
